vitopack: Actuarial Helpers for Triangles, Exposures and Czech Birth Numbers

Source: R/vitopack-package.R
vitopack-package.Rd

A collection of utilities that grew out of day-to-day non-life actuarial work at Com-PASS Advisory. The package is split into a few thematic families:

Details

  • Triangles & chain-ladder — create_triangle(), create_cumulative_triangle(), create_chl_coefs(), create_chl_coefs_weighted(), create_run_off_check() and friends.

  • Policy columns & exposures — create_find_columns(), create_policy_exposure_columns_m(), create_policy_exposure_days_columns(), create_multiple_columns_m().

  • Czech birth numbers — rc_to_birth_day(), rc_to_birth_day_2(), rc_to_birth_day_3().

  • Color palettes — rgb_colors_for_plot(), get_colors(), get_colors_plus(), get_colors_duo(), plot_color_bars(), rainbow_cat().

  • I/O & misc — load_excel_sheets(), load_xlsb_sheets(), numeric_format(), bind_with_source().

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/Com-PASS-OV/vitopack

  • https://Com-PASS-OV.github.io/vitopack/

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/Com-PASS-OV/vitopack/issues

Author
